blocked_by_gate_questions.question: Read public marketplace/category pages to compare demand signals, saturation, price bands, and buyer language.
Review seller terms, tax/KYC/payment setup, refund obligations, and platform fees.
Create, publish, update, or promote a marketplace listing or public product page.
Create seller accounts, connect payouts, accept agreements, or configure payment settings.

boundary_notes: This is a local draft artifact only; it is not a marketplace listing or public product page.
No marketplace browsing, seller account setup, pricing, payment, payout, or legal/tax review has been performed.
No revenue, demand, conversion, or buyer-count claim is made by this local draft.
Live validation requires the parked browser/legal/payment/public-action gates to be explicitly approved first.

checklist_rows.task: Fill the positioning template and mark any claims that need evidence.
List screenshots needed for the product page or announcement.
Run a QA pass on links, copy, onboarding steps, and release notes.
Write a boundary README that avoids revenue claims and live validation claims.

checklist_rows.evidence: Requires approved browser read-only service request.
checklist_rows.task: Compare live marketplace demand, saturation, and buyer language.
Review seller terms, payment setup, refunds, tax, and KYC obligations.
Create or update any public listing or product page.
Connect payouts, accept agreements, or configure payment settings.
After a future approved launch, review traffic, replies, conversion signals, support load, and next iteration.

forbidden_actions: Do not publish this draft, browse marketplaces, create seller accounts, accept terms, configure payouts, set prices, or claim live demand from it.
Do not mutate service requests, assign/start workers, call APIs, touch wallets/payments, trade, submit, post, or create external side effects from this draft.
next_action: Run a local quality pass on the draft content and only request marketplace/browser/legal/payment gates if live demand or seller validation is needed.

positioning_answers.answer: Solo AI builder preparing a small product launch without a launch manager, launch checklist, or agency support.
Launch work is scattered across notes, screenshots, copy drafts, QA reminders, and follow-up ideas.
The builder is close enough to launch that missed screenshots, broken links, unclear positioning, or no review loop would cost momentum.
Organize the launch into one practical checklist pack that reduces missed steps and makes review easier, without promising revenue.
A filled example, a screenshot shot list, a QA pass table, and a post-launch review template should make the pack feel immediately usable.
Positioning template, launch checklist, screenshot shot list, QA pass, post-launch review, and boundary README.
No marketplace listing, pricing advice, payment setup, launch agency service, traffic guarantee, or revenue claim.
The first positioning pass should take under thirty minutes for a focused builder with a known product.
The README must clarify that the pack is a local planning aid, not legal, tax, payment, or marketplace guidance.
Publishing, selling, pricing, seller account setup, payment setup, and live marketplace claims require browser/legal/payment gates first.

summary: Created a local draft artifact for the AI builder launch checklist pack: one filled positioning template and one launch checklist table. The draft is explicitly not a marketplace listing, price, public page, or payment-enabled product.
